## Summary

Describe the backend change and the QuixiCore contract surface it affects.

## Checks

- [ ] Updated `.quixicore/kernels.yaml` if kernel coverage changed.
- [ ] Updated `.quixicore/quant-formats.yaml` if quant format support changed.
- [ ] Added or updated correctness coverage.
- [ ] Added or updated benchmark coverage, or explained why it is not applicable.
- [ ] Followed `docs/repository-structure.md`.

## Validation

List commands run, hardware target, driver/runtime versions, and relevant logs.
